title: Day 09 Reflection
description: Solidify debouncing and custom hooks before Day 10 list filtering and sorting.

prompts.question: Explain debouncing in your own words. Why does a movie search need it but a login form submit does not?
prompts.guidance: Compare keystroke-driven search vs explicit submit actions.

prompts.question: Walk through your useDebounce hook. What state does it hold and when does the debounced value update?
prompts.guidance: Mention setTimeout, cleanup, and the delay parameter.

prompts.question: Did you hit stale state or multiple-request bugs? What caused them and how did you fix them?
prompts.guidance: If not, describe how Network tab and dependency arrays would reveal the issue.

prompts.question: How does PaginatedResponse<T> make your API layer reusable for future endpoints?
prompts.guidance: Think about generics vs duplicating page/total fields per type.

prompts.question: What is one thing you would extract into a second custom hook before adding filters tomorrow?
prompts.guidance: Consider useMovieSearch vs keeping logic in the page component.
